name_en: Original batch Burberry Classic Tote Medium, no introduction needed, widely known as the top choice from B, suitable for all ages! Looks amazing on! Made from imported full-grain calf leather with waterproof plaid cotton fabric! Exclusive factory stock, impeccable details and shape.
